meta.auditName: Q4 Branch Compliance Audit - South Zone

previousAuditComparison.description: Comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleObservation: High incidence of policy non-compliance in cash handling procedures.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Implement daily reconciliation checks and provide refresher training.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleObservation: Insufficient documentation for customer KYC processes identified.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleRecommendation: Standardize KYC document verification and record-keeping protocols.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
